citation: Acemoglu D, Autor D. Skills, Tasks and Technologies. NBER w16082, 2010.

tables.label: Skills/tasks framework — routine vs abstract task intensity (see paper Tables 1–3)
tables.note: Handbook-style paper; primary tables are task-content indices by occupation/education. Extract deferred to encode wave — PDF verified.
tables.encode_hint: Stratum = education or routine-task quartile; treatment = technology exposure.
